title: Home Screen - Device is up to date - Both earbuds are connected
scenario: Home Screen shows "Device is up to date" status with battery levels and software version for connected earbuds
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure both earbuds are connected and have the latest firmware installed.
4. Locate the Status Box on the Home screen.
5. Verify the battery levels for Left, Right, and Case earbuds are displayed with green indicators.
6. Verify the "connected" status is shown with a green indicator.
7. Verify a device image showing left and right earbuds is displayed.
11. Verify the software version is displayed with a green indicator.
expected: Home screen displays "Device is up to date" status. Status Box shows battery levels for Left, Right, and Case earbuds with green indicators, a "connected" status with green indicator, and a device image showing left and right earbuds. Tapping the Status Box reveals a "Software" field with the software version and green indicator.
